definitions.name: SET BUFFER
definitions.documentation: Set the size of the variable area. This must be the first instruction in a program apart from Rem lines.

definitions.name: DIM
definitions.documentation: Dimension an array.

definitions.name: FREE
definitions.documentation: Give the amount of free memory in the variable buffer area.

definitions.name: DEF FN
definitions.documentation: Create a user-defined function.

definitions.name: FN
definitions.documentation: Call a user-defined function.

definitions.name: INK
definitions.documentation: Ink command.

signatures.presentation: Ink(draw color, background color, border color)

definitions.name: WAIT
definitions.documentation: Wait for a number of 50ths of a second.

definitions.name: END
definitions.documentation: End the current program.

definitions.name: STOP
definitions.documentation: Interrupt the current program.

definitions.name: EDIT
definitions.documentation: Leave the current program and return to the Edit Screen.

definitions.name: DIRECT
definitions.documentation: Leave the current program and return to Direct Mode.

definitions.name: BREAK OFF
definitions.documentation: Turn the program break keys off.

definitions.name: BREAK ON
definitions.documentation: Turn the program break keys on.

definitions.name: SYSTEM
definitions.documentation: Go to Workbench.

definitions.name: REM
definitions.documentation: Insert a reminder message into a program.

definitions.name: LEFT$
definitions.documentation: Return the leftmost characters of a string.

definitions.name: RIGHT$
definitions.documentation: Return the rightmost characters of a string.

definitions.name: MID$
definitions.documentation: Return characters from the middle of a string.

definitions.name: INSTR
definitions.documentation: Search for one string inside another string.

definitions.name: UPPER$
definitions.documentation: Convert a string to upper case.

definitions.name: LOWER$
definitions.documentation: Convert a string to lower case.

definitions.name: STR$
definitions.documentation: Convert a number into a string.

definitions.name: VAL
definitions.documentation: Convert a string of digits into a number.

definitions.name: STRING$
definitions.documentation: Create a new string from an existing string.

definitions.name: SPACE$
definitions.documentation: Return a string containing a number of spaces.

definitions.name: FLIP$
definitions.documentation: Reverse the order of the characters in a string.

definitions.name: REPEAT$
definitions.documentation: Repeat a string a number of times.

definitions.name: CHR$
definitions.documentation: Return the character with a given ASCII code.

definitions.name: ASC
definitions.documentation: Give the ASCII code of the first character in a string.

definitions.name: LEN
definitions.documentation: Give the length of a string.

definitions.name: SORT
definitions.documentation: Sort all elements in an array.

definitions.name: MATCH
definitions.documentation: Search a sorted array for a value.

definitions.name: DRAW
definitions.documentation: Draw a line, optionally reusing the current draw position before the To keyword.

signatures.presentation: Draw x1, y1 To x2, y2

definitions.name: PRINT
definitions.documentation: Print items on screen from the current cursor position.

definitions.name: PEN
definitions.documentation: Set the colour of text in the current window.

definitions.name: PAPER
definitions.documentation: Set the text background colour in the current window.

definitions.name: PEN$
definitions.documentation: Return the current text pen colour index.

definitions.name: PAPER$
definitions.documentation: Return the current text paper colour index.

definitions.name: INVERSE ON/OFF
definitions.documentation: Enable or disable inverse text mode.

definitions.name: SHADE ON/OFF
definitions.documentation: Enable or disable shaded text style.

definitions.name: UNDER ON/OFF
definitions.documentation: Enable or disable underlined text style.

definitions.name: SET TEXT
definitions.documentation: Set one or more text style flags in a single instruction.

definitions.name: TEXT STYLES
definitions.documentation: Return the current text style flags as a numeric mask.

definitions.name: WRITING
definitions.documentation: Control text writing mode for clipping, transparency, or replacement behaviour.

definitions.name: LOCATE
definitions.documentation: Move the text cursor to a specific column and row.

definitions.name: HOME
definitions.documentation: Move the text cursor to the home position.

definitions.name: CMOVE
definitions.documentation: Move the text cursor relative to its current position.

definitions.name: CMOVE$
definitions.documentation: Return a control string that performs a relative cursor move.

definitions.name: AT
definitions.documentation: Return a control string that positions output at a specific cursor location.

definitions.name: CENTRE
definitions.documentation: Print text centred in the current window line.

definitions.name: TAB$
definitions.documentation: Return a control string for tab-based text alignment.

definitions.name: SET TAB
definitions.documentation: Set the tab stop width used by text output.

definitions.name: CDOWN
definitions.documentation: Move the text cursor down by one line.

definitions.name: CDOWN$
definitions.documentation: Return a control string that moves the cursor down.

definitions.name: CUP
definitions.documentation: Move the text cursor up by one line.

definitions.name: CLEFT
definitions.documentation: Move the text cursor left by one column.

definitions.name: CRIGHT
definitions.documentation: Move the text cursor right by one column.

definitions.name: CUP$
definitions.documentation: Return a control string that moves the cursor up.

definitions.name: CLEFT$
definitions.documentation: Return a control string that moves the cursor left.

definitions.name: CRIGHT$
definitions.documentation: Return a control string that moves the cursor right.

definitions.name: CLINE
definitions.documentation: Clear the current text line.

definitions.name: X CURS
definitions.documentation: Return the current cursor X position.

definitions.name: Y CURS
definitions.documentation: Return the current cursor Y position.

definitions.name: MEMORIZE X/Y
definitions.documentation: Memorize the current cursor X/Y position.

definitions.name: REMEMBER X/Y
definitions.documentation: Restore the cursor X/Y position saved by MEMORIZE X/Y.

definitions.name: CURS PEN
definitions.documentation: Set the text cursor colour.

definitions.name: SET CURS
definitions.documentation: Change cursor appearance and behaviour.

definitions.name: CURS ON/OFF
definitions.documentation: Show or hide the text cursor.

definitions.name: ZONE$
definitions.documentation: Return a zone control string for positioning or clipping text output.

definitions.name: BORDER$
definitions.documentation: Return a bordered text string for framed output.

definitions.name: HSCROLL
definitions.documentation: Scroll text horizontally in the active window.

definitions.name: VSCROLL
definitions.documentation: Scroll text vertically in the active window.

definitions.name: USING
definitions.documentation: Print numeric values with a custom format template.

definitions.name: LPRINT
definitions.documentation: Send text output to the printer stream.

definitions.name: WINDOW
definitions.documentation: Select the active text window.

definitions.name: WIND OPEN
definitions.documentation: Open a text window with position and size.

signatures.presentation: Wind Open number, x, y, width, height

definitions.name: WIND CLOSE
definitions.documentation: Close a text window.

definitions.name: WIND MOVE
definitions.documentation: Move a text window to a new position.

definitions.name: WIND SIZE
definitions.documentation: Resize a text window.

definitions.name: WIND SAVE
definitions.documentation: Save a window definition for later restore.

definitions.name: CLW
definitions.documentation: Clear the current text window.

definitions.name: BORDER
definitions.documentation: Set border style for a text window.

definitions.name: HSLIDER
definitions.documentation: Display or update a horizontal slider in a window.

definitions.name: VSLIDER
definitions.documentation: Display or update a vertical slider in a window.

definitions.name: SET SLIDER
definitions.documentation: Configure slider geometry and range.

definitions.name: TITLE TOP
definitions.documentation: Set the top title of a text window.

definitions.name: TITLE BOTTOM
definitions.documentation: Set the bottom title of a text window.

definitions.name: READ TEXT$
definitions.documentation: Read a line of text from the current window input.

definitions.name: WINDON
definitions.documentation: Return the number of the current active window.

definitions.name: JOY
definitions.documentation: Return the joystick state bitmask for a port.

definitions.name: JUP
definitions.documentation: Return non-zero if joystick is pushed up.

definitions.name: JDOWN
definitions.documentation: Return non-zero if joystick is pushed down.

definitions.name: JLEFT
definitions.documentation: Return non-zero if joystick is pushed left.

definitions.name: JRIGHT
definitions.documentation: Return non-zero if joystick is pushed right.

definitions.name: FIRE
definitions.documentation: Return non-zero when the joystick fire button is pressed.

definitions.name: MOUSE KEY
definitions.documentation: Return mouse button state.

definitions.name: MOUSE CLICK
definitions.documentation: Return mouse click transition state.

definitions.name: MOUSE SCREEN
definitions.documentation: Return the screen currently under the mouse pointer.

definitions.name: SHOW
definitions.documentation: Show the mouse pointer.

definitions.name: HIDE
definitions.documentation: Hide the mouse pointer.

definitions.name: CHANGE MOUSE
definitions.documentation: Change mouse pointer shape.

definitions.name: LIMIT MOUSE
definitions.documentation: Limit mouse movement to a rectangular area.

signatures.presentation: Limit Mouse x1, y1 To x2, y2

definitions.name: BLENGTH
definitions.documentation: Return the length of a memory bank.

definitions.name: BSTART
definitions.documentation: Return the start address of a memory bank.

definitions.name: SPRITE BASE
definitions.documentation: Return base address for sprite data.

definitions.name: ICON BASE
definitions.documentation: Return base address for icon data.

definitions.name: SCREEN BASE
definitions.documentation: Return base address for screen data.

definitions.name: RESERVE AS WORK
definitions.documentation: Reserve a work bank in standard memory.

definitions.name: RESERVE AS CHIP WORK
definitions.documentation: Reserve a work bank in chip memory.

signatures.presentation: Reserve As Chip Work bank, length

definitions.name: RESERVE AS CHIP DATA
definitions.documentation: Reserve a data bank in chip memory.

signatures.presentation: Reserve As Chip Data bank, length

definitions.name: ERASE
definitions.documentation: Erase a specific memory bank.

definitions.name: ERASE TEMP
definitions.documentation: Erase temporary banks.

definitions.name: ERASE ALL
definitions.documentation: Erase all memory banks.

definitions.name: BANK SWAP
definitions.documentation: Swap two memory banks.

definitions.name: BANK SHRINK
definitions.documentation: Shrink a memory bank length.

definitions.name: LIST BANK
definitions.documentation: List all current banks and sizes.

definitions.name: LOAD
definitions.documentation: Load a bank from disk.

definitions.name: SAVE
definitions.documentation: Save a bank to disk.

definitions.name: BLOAD
definitions.documentation: Load binary data into memory.

definitions.name: BSAVE
definitions.documentation: Save binary memory data.

definitions.name: BSEND
definitions.documentation: Send bank data to external destination.

definitions.name: BGRAB
definitions.documentation: Grab raw data into a bank.

definitions.name: LOWRES
definitions.documentation: Return LOWRES screen mode constant.

definitions.name: HIRES
definitions.documentation: Return HIRES screen mode constant.

definitions.name: LACED
definitions.documentation: Return LACED screen mode flag constant.

definitions.name: SCREEN
definitions.documentation: Return the current screen number.

definitions.name: SCIN
definitions.documentation: Return the screen number at a coordinate.

definitions.name: SCREEN WIDTH
definitions.documentation: Return width of a screen.

definitions.name: SCREEN HEIGHT
definitions.documentation: Return height of a screen.

definitions.name: SCREEN COLOUR
definitions.documentation: Return colour count of a screen.

definitions.name: SCREEN MODE
definitions.documentation: Return mode flags of a screen.

definitions.name: SCREEN DISPLAY
definitions.documentation: Set a screen display position.

definitions.name: SCREEN OFFSET
definitions.documentation: Set screen hardware scrolling offset.

definitions.name: DUAL PLAYFIELD
definitions.documentation: Enable dual playfield mode for paired screens.

definitions.name: DUAL PRIORITY
definitions.documentation: Set priority order for dual playfield screens.

definitions.name: SCREEN CLONE
definitions.documentation: Clone one screen configuration into another.

definitions.name: SCREEN CLOSE
definitions.documentation: Close an open screen.

definitions.name: SCREEN SHOW
definitions.documentation: Show a hidden screen.

definitions.name: SCREEN TO FRONT
definitions.documentation: Move a screen to front display priority.

definitions.name: SCREEN TO BACK
definitions.documentation: Move a screen to back display priority.

definitions.name: VIEW
definitions.documentation: Force screen view update after display changes.

definitions.name: DEFAULT
definitions.documentation: Reset screen and display defaults.

definitions.name: DEFAULT PALETTE
definitions.documentation: Restore default colour palette.

definitions.name: INC
definitions.documentation: Increment an integer variable by 1 using a single fast instruction.

definitions.name: DEC
definitions.documentation: Decrement an integer variable by 1 using a single fast instruction.

definitions.name: ADD
definitions.documentation: Perform fast integer addition, with an optional wrap-around range.

signatures.presentation: Add variable, expression, base To top

definitions.name: MAX
definitions.documentation: Return the larger of two expressions of the same type.

definitions.name: MIN
definitions.documentation: Return the smaller of two expressions of the same type.

definitions.name: SGN
definitions.documentation: Return -1, 0, or 1 depending on whether a number is negative, zero, or positive.

definitions.name: ABS
definitions.documentation: Return the absolute value of a number, ignoring its sign.

definitions.name: INT
definitions.documentation: Round a floating point number down to the nearest whole number.

definitions.name: FIX
definitions.documentation: Control how floating point values are displayed by setting output precision.

definitions.name: SET DOUBLE PRECISION
definitions.documentation: Enable double precision floating point calculations for the current program.

definitions.name: SQR
definitions.documentation: Calculate the square root of a positive number.

definitions.name: EXP
definitions.documentation: Return the exponential of a floating point value.

definitions.name: LOG
definitions.documentation: Return the base-10 logarithm of a value.

definitions.name: LN
definitions.documentation: Return the natural logarithm of a floating point value.

definitions.name: PI#
definitions.documentation: Return the constant π for trigonometric calculations.

definitions.name: DEGREE
definitions.documentation: Switch trigonometric functions to use degrees instead of radians.

definitions.name: RADIAN
definitions.documentation: Switch trigonometric functions back to radian input.

definitions.name: SIN
definitions.documentation: Calculate the sine of an angle.

definitions.name: COS
definitions.documentation: Calculate the cosine of an angle.

definitions.name: TAN
definitions.documentation: Calculate the tangent of an angle.

definitions.name: ACOS
definitions.documentation: Calculate the angle whose cosine is the given value.

definitions.name: ASIN
definitions.documentation: Calculate the angle whose sine is the given value.

definitions.name: ATAN
definitions.documentation: Calculate the angle whose tangent is the given value.

definitions.name: HSIN
definitions.documentation: Calculate the hyperbolic sine of an angle.

definitions.name: HCOS
definitions.documentation: Calculate the hyperbolic cosine of an angle.

definitions.name: HTAN
definitions.documentation: Calculate the hyperbolic tangent of an angle.

definitions.name: RND
definitions.documentation: Generate a random integer between zero and the specified number.

definitions.name: RANDOMIZE
definitions.documentation: Set the random seed used by the RND function.

definitions.name: GOTO
definitions.documentation: Jump to a label, line number, or expression-defined destination in the current program.

definitions.name: GOSUB
definitions.documentation: Jump to a subroutine and later return to the statement after the call.

definitions.name: RETURN
definitions.documentation: Return from a subroutine that was entered by GOSUB.

definitions.name: POP
definitions.documentation: Discard pending RETURN information so a subroutine can be left without returning normally.

definitions.name: IF
definitions.documentation: Choose actions based on whether a condition is true.

definitions.name: THEN
definitions.documentation: Introduce the action part of an IF ... THEN decision.

definitions.name: AND
definitions.documentation: Require multiple conditions to be true in a conditional expression.

signatures.presentation: If condition And condition Then statement

definitions.name: OR
definitions.documentation: Allow any one of multiple conditions to satisfy a conditional expression.

signatures.presentation: If condition Or condition Then statement

definitions.name: ELSE
definitions.documentation: Provide the alternative branch when an IF condition is false.

signatures.presentation: If condition Then statement1 Else statement2

definitions.name: END IF
definitions.documentation: Terminate a structured IF test block.

definitions.name: ELSE IF
definitions.documentation: Introduce another conditional branch inside a structured IF ... END IF block.

signatures.presentation: If condition Else If condition Else statement End If

definitions.name: TRUE
definitions.documentation: Return the AMOS value for true, which is -1.

definitions.name: FALSE
definitions.documentation: Return the AMOS value for false, which is 0.

definitions.name: NOT
definitions.documentation: Invert the bits of a binary value and can be used as a logical negation.

definitions.name: SWAP
definitions.documentation: Swap the contents of two variables of the same type.

definitions.name: DO
definitions.documentation: Mark the beginning of a DO ... LOOP that repeats statements indefinitely until exited.

definitions.name: LOOP
definitions.documentation: Return control to the matching DO statement in a looping block.

definitions.name: EXIT
definitions.documentation: Break out of the current loop, or multiple nested loops when given a number.

definitions.name: EXIT IF
definitions.documentation: Leave a loop only if the supplied expression evaluates to true.

definitions.name: WHILE
definitions.documentation: Start a loop that repeats while its condition remains true.

definitions.name: WEND
definitions.documentation: Terminate a WHILE ... WEND loop and re-check the condition.

definitions.name: REPEAT
definitions.documentation: Mark the start of a loop that always runs at least once before its condition is checked.

definitions.name: UNTIL
definitions.documentation: End a REPEAT loop when the specified condition becomes true.

definitions.name: FOR
definitions.documentation: Repeat a loop a specific number of times using an index variable.

signatures.presentation: For index=first number To last number

definitions.name: TO
definitions.documentation: Define the upper bound in structures such as FOR ... TO ... NEXT.

signatures.presentation: For index=first number To last number

definitions.name: NEXT
definitions.documentation: End a FOR loop and advance its index to the next iteration.

definitions.name: STEP
definitions.documentation: Control how much a FOR loop index changes on each iteration.

signatures.presentation: For index=first number To last number Step size

definitions.name: ON
definitions.documentation: Force a jump or procedure dispatch based on the numeric value of a variable.

signatures.presentation: On variable Proc list of procedures
On variable Goto list of numbered lines or labels

parameters.name: list of numbered lines or labels

signatures.presentation: On variable Gosub list of numbered lines or labels

parameters.name: list of numbered lines or labels

definitions.name: EVERY
definitions.documentation: Call a subroutine or procedure automatically at regular time intervals.

definitions.name: EVERY ON
definitions.documentation: Re-enable automatic EVERY calls before a subroutine or procedure finishes.

definitions.name: EVERY OFF
definitions.documentation: Disable automatic EVERY calls altogether.

definitions.name: DATA
definitions.documentation: Embed a list of data items in a program for later reading.

definitions.name: READ
definitions.documentation: Read items from DATA statements into variables using the current data pointer.

definitions.name: RESTORE
definitions.documentation: Move the current READ pointer to a chosen label, line, or expression-defined data position.

definitions.name: PROCEDURE
definitions.documentation: Create a procedure block with optional local parameters.

definitions.name: END PROC
definitions.documentation: Terminate a PROCEDURE and optionally return a value to PARAM variables.

definitions.name: SET STACK
definitions.documentation: Set how many nested procedure calls are allowed before stack exhaustion.

definitions.name: PROC
definitions.documentation: Flag the following name explicitly as a procedure call.

definitions.name: ON PROC
definitions.documentation: Dispatch to one of several procedures depending on a numeric selector.

signatures.presentation: On variable Proc list of procedures

definitions.name: POP PROC
definitions.documentation: Leave the current procedure immediately without waiting for END PROC.

definitions.name: ON BREAK PROC
definitions.documentation: Jump to a procedure when program break is triggered.

definitions.name: SHARED
definitions.documentation: Inside a procedure, mark local variables as shared globals accessible from the main program.

definitions.name: GLOBAL
definitions.documentation: Outside procedures, declare variables as global everywhere. Inside a procedure, import global variables into that local scope.

definitions.name: PARAM
definitions.documentation: Return the latest integer value passed back by END PROC[expression].

definitions.name: PARAM#
definitions.documentation: Return the latest real value passed back by END PROC[expression].

definitions.name: PARAM$
definitions.documentation: Return the latest string value passed back by END PROC[expression].

definitions.name: RESERVE AS DATA
definitions.documentation: Reserve a permanent data bank with the requested byte length.

signatures.presentation: Reserve As Data bank number, length

definitions.name: LENGTH
definitions.documentation: Return the size of a memory bank, usually measured in bytes.

definitions.name: START
definitions.documentation: Return the start address of a reserved memory bank.

definitions.name: SCREEN OPEN
definitions.documentation: Open a new screen with the requested dimensions, colour count, and pixel mode.

signatures.presentation: Screen Open number, width, height, colours, pixel mode

definitions.name: CLS
definitions.documentation: Clear all or part of the current screen.

signatures.presentation: Cls colour number, x1, y1 To x2, y2

definitions.name: SCREEN HIDE
definitions.documentation: Hide the current screen or a selected screen until it is shown again.

definitions.name: SCREEN
definitions.documentation: Set the current screen used for text and graphics operations.

definitions.name: GET PALETTE
definitions.documentation: Copy colours from another screen into the current screen.

definitions.name: LOAD IFF
definitions.documentation: Load Iff command.

definitions.name: SAVE IFF
definitions.documentation: Save the current screen as an IFF picture file, optionally choosing compression mode.

definitions.name: PEEK
definitions.documentation: Read a single byte from an address in memory.

definitions.name: POKE
definitions.documentation: Write a single byte to an address in memory.

definitions.name: LOKE
definitions.documentation: Write a four-byte word to an even memory address.

definitions.name: PLOT
definitions.documentation: Plot a single point on the current screen.

definitions.name: POINT
definitions.documentation: Return the colour index at the selected screen coordinates.

definitions.documentation: Copy an area from one screen to another.

signatures.presentation: Screen Copy source number To destination number
Screen Copy source number, x1, y1 To destination number, x2, y2

signatures.presentation: Def Scroll number, x1, y1 To x2, y2, horizontal value, vertical value

definitions.documentation: Scroll a previously defined screen zone.

definitions.name: ZOOM

signatures.presentation: Zoom source number, x1, y1, x2, y2 To destination number, x3, y3, x4, y4

definitions.documentation: Return address of the physical screen bit-plane.

definitions.documentation: Return the logical screen identifier.

definitions.documentation: Ellipse command.

definitions.documentation: Set Pattern command.

definitions.documentation: Sprite command.

definitions.documentation: Sprite Off command.

definitions.documentation: Set the base address for sprite data.

definitions.documentation: Set the display priority of a sprite.

definitions.documentation: Return the collision state of a sprite.

definitions.documentation: Display an icon on the screen.

definitions.documentation: Turn off an icon.

definitions.documentation: Set the base address for icon data.

definitions.name: ICON IMAGE
definitions.documentation: Define an icon image.

definitions.documentation: Return the collision state of an icon.

definitions.name: BLIT
definitions.documentation: Perform a blitter operation between memory areas.

definitions.documentation: Wait for the blitter to finish its current operation.

definitions.name: BLIT MODE
definitions.documentation: Set the blitter operation mode.

definitions.name: BLIT FILL
definitions.documentation: Fill a memory area using the blitter.

definitions.name: BLIT COPY
definitions.documentation: Copy a memory area using the blitter.

definitions.documentation: Test the blitter status.

definitions.name: SET COPPER
definitions.documentation: Set a copper list for display effects.

definitions.documentation: Enable copper list processing.

definitions.name: COPPER OFF
definitions.documentation: Disable copper list processing.

definitions.documentation: Wait for the copper to reach a specific position.

definitions.name: COPPER MOVE
definitions.documentation: Move a value to a copper register.

definitions.name: SET RASTER
definitions.documentation: Set a raster interrupt routine.

definitions.name: RASTER ON
definitions.documentation: Enable raster interrupts.

definitions.name: RASTER OFF
definitions.documentation: Disable raster interrupts.

definitions.documentation: Set a custom interrupt routine.

definitions.name: INT ON
definitions.documentation: Enable custom interrupts.

definitions.name: INT OFF
definitions.documentation: Disable custom interrupts.

definitions.name: SET DMA

definitions.documentation: Return the amount of available Chip memory in bytes.

definitions.name: CURS OFF
definitions.documentation: Hide the text cursor in the current window.

definitions.name: CURS ON
definitions.documentation: Reveal the text cursor in the current window.

definitions.name: DRAW TO
definitions.documentation: Draw a line from the current graphics cursor position to the specified coordinates.

definitions.name: FAST FREE
definitions.documentation: Return the amount of available Fast memory in bytes.

definitions.name: FLASH OFF
definitions.documentation: Cancel all active colour flashing sequences.

definitions.name: HIDE ON
definitions.documentation: Hide the mouse pointer immediately, bypassing the HIDE counter.

definitions.name: INPUT#
definitions.documentation: Read variables from a file or device channel.

definitions.name: INVERSE OFF
definitions.documentation: Disable inverse (swapped text/background colour) mode.

definitions.name: INVERSE ON
definitions.documentation: Enable inverse mode: swap text and background colours when printing.

definitions.name: LINE INPUT#
definitions.documentation: Read variables from a file or device channel using carriage return as separator instead of comma.

definitions.name: MEMORIZE X
definitions.documentation: Save the current x-coordinate of the text cursor for later restoration with Remember X.

definitions.name: MEMORIZE Y
definitions.documentation: Save the current y-coordinate of the text cursor for later restoration with Remember Y.

definitions.name: MENU MOUSE OFF
definitions.documentation: Disable menu display when the right mouse button is pressed.

definitions.name: MENU MOUSE ON
definitions.documentation: Enable menu display when the right mouse button is pressed.

definitions.name: MENU$
definitions.documentation: Define the appearance of a single menu item.

definitions.name: MOVON
definitions.documentation: Check whether a particular object is being moved by Move X or Move Y. Returns -1 while in motion, 0 for static.

definitions.name: ON AMAL
definitions.documentation: Activate a specific AMAL animation channel by channel number.

definitions.name: ON MENU OFF
definitions.documentation: Disable automatic menu event handling.

definitions.name: ON MENU ON
definitions.documentation: Enable automatic menu event handling set up by On Menu Proc, Gosub or Goto.

definitions.name: PRINT#
definitions.documentation: Write variables to a file or device channel.

definitions.name: RAIN
definitions.documentation: Change the colour of a specific scan line in an active rainbow effect.

definitions.name: REMEMBER X
definitions.documentation: Restore the x-coordinate of the text cursor to the position saved by Memorize X.

definitions.name: REMEMBER Y
definitions.documentation: Restore the y-coordinate of the text cursor to the position saved by Memorize Y.

definitions.name: ROL.B
definitions.documentation: Rotate a byte value left by the specified number of bit positions.

definitions.name: ROL.W
definitions.documentation: Rotate a word value left by the specified number of bit positions.

definitions.name: ROL.L
definitions.documentation: Rotate a long word value left by the specified number of bit positions.

definitions.name: ROR.B
definitions.documentation: Rotate a byte value right by the specified number of bit positions.

definitions.name: ROR.W
definitions.documentation: Rotate a word value right by the specified number of bit positions.

definitions.name: ROR.L
definitions.documentation: Rotate a long word value right by the specified number of bit positions.

definitions.name: SCROLL OFF
definitions.documentation: Disable automatic scrolling of the current window.

definitions.name: SCROLL ON
definitions.documentation: Enable automatic scrolling of the current window.

definitions.name: SHADE OFF
definitions.documentation: Disable shading (brightness reduction mask) on subsequent text.

definitions.name: SHADE ON
definitions.documentation: Enable shading: applies a brightness-reducing mask pattern to printed characters.

definitions.name: SHOW ON
definitions.documentation: Reveal the mouse pointer immediately, bypassing the internal HIDE/SHOW counter.

definitions.name: SPRITE UPDATE OFF
definitions.documentation: Disable automatic Sprite position updates. Use Sprite Update for manual control.

definitions.name: SPRITE UPDATE ON
definitions.documentation: Re-enable automatic Sprite position updates.

definitions.name: TIMER
definitions.documentation: Reserved variable: count in 50ths of a second since the Amiga was switched on. Can be read or set.

definitions.name: UNDER OFF
definitions.documentation: Disable underline mode for subsequent text output.

definitions.name: UNDER ON
definitions.documentation: Enable underline mode for subsequent text output.

definitions.name: UPDATE OFF
definitions.documentation: Disable automatic redrawing of all Bobs and Sprites. Changes accumulate until Update or Update On is called.

definitions.name: UPDATE ON
definitions.documentation: Re-enable automatic redrawing of all Bobs and Sprites.

definitions.name: X MOUSE
definitions.documentation: Reserved variable: report or set the x-coordinate of the mouse pointer in hardware coordinates.

definitions.name: XGR
definitions.documentation: Return the x-coordinate of the current graphics cursor position.

definitions.name: Y MOUSE
definitions.documentation: Reserved variable: report or set the y-coordinate of the mouse pointer in hardware coordinates.

definitions.name: YGR
definitions.documentation: Return the y-coordinate of the current graphics cursor position.

definitions.name: AS
definitions.documentation: Array Size: return the number of elements in an AMOS Professional array at the given address.
